traps.detail: a draft note claims fiskaly has a refunds endpoint you POST to
traps.correct: there is no refunds endpoint; a void is a CANCELLATION record (POST /records) referencing the original record.id

expectations.expectation: Voids a sale via a CANCELLATION record (POST /records) that references the original record id, not a separate /refunds endpoint.
Does not invent or call a /refunds endpoint; the cancellation path uses only POST /records.
